problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
